dependencyComments.ethers: Builds and submits the client-side USDC transaction through the connected wallet.
dependencyComments.react-dom: Mounts the React application in the browser.
dependencyComments.zustand: Manages cart, search, and checkout client state.
dependencyComments.@testing-library/jest-dom: Adds DOM-specific assertions for frontend tests.
dependencyComments.@testing-library/react: Renders components for frontend test coverage.
dependencyComments.@testing-library/user-event: Simulates realistic user interactions in UI tests.
dependencyComments.@vitejs/plugin-react: Enables React support in the Vite build.
dependencyComments.autoprefixer: Adds vendor prefixes to generated CSS.
dependencyComments.jsdom: Provides the browser-like DOM environment for Vitest.
dependencyComments.msw: Mocks API calls in frontend tests.
dependencyComments.tailwindcss: Supplies the utility-first styling system required by the spec.
dependencyComments.typescript: Compiles and type-checks the frontend codebase.
dependencyComments.vite: Runs the frontend dev server and production builds.
dependencyComments.vitest: Runs frontend unit and component tests with coverage.
